description_long: This object is a handheld electronic device with a cylindrical body, featuring a wood-textured finish on both ends and a ribbed, dark central grip section. The top portion is wider and bowl-shaped, likely housing a lens or light emitter, while the bottom section is slightly flared and includes a control panel with several colored buttons. The ribbed grip in the middle appears to be made of a rubber or plastic material, providing ergonomic handling. The control panel, visible on one side, suggests the device is operated via physical buttons. The overall design is reminiscent of a high-end flashlight or a specialized tool, with a blend of wood and metallic elements giving it a premium, retro-futuristic appearance.
description: A cylindrical handheld electronic device with a wood-textured finish, ribbed grip, and a control panel with colored buttons, resembling a premium flashlight or tool.
description_view_0: Front view showing the control panel with colored buttons and the ribbed grip section.
description_view_1: Side view with the control panel partially visible and the wood-textured body prominent.
description_view_2: Rear view with no visible control panel, highlighting the symmetrical wood and ribbed grip design.
description_view_3: Angled side view with the control panel just out of sight, emphasizing the bowl-shaped top and ergonomic grip.
